reviews.comment:
La peor estación de servicio que he ido en mi vida. Una vez cargué y no me quisieron dar factura de compra, y al insistir, me querían cobrar un extra, según ellos, es lo que corresponde (piensan que uno nació ayer). La segunda situación fue la peor. Fui a cargar después de un tiempo, le dije diesel 500 y le cargó NAFTA! Mi auto no es naftero! Dejó de funcionar y me di con la sorpresita en el taller. Un desastre este lugar.

(Translated by Google)
The worst gas station I've ever been to. Once I filled up and they refused to give me a receipt, and when I insisted, they tried to charge me extra, claiming it was the standard procedure (they think I was born yesterday). The second time was even worse. I went back to fill up after a while, told them I wanted diesel 500, and they put gasoline in my car! My car doesn't run on gasoline! It stopped working, and I got a nasty surprise at the repair shop. This place is a disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtbE9XZjhRRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good service and quality products
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoLWE3cS1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Podes almorzar variedad de ricas ensaladas, smoothies riquísimos o una entretenida merienda para disfrutar y charlar. Se puede pagar con débito tb. Y tiene un kiosko completo tb.

(Translated by Google)
You can have a variety of delicious salads for lunch, amazing smoothies, or a fun afternoon snack to enjoy while chatting. Debit cards are accepted. And there's a fully stocked kiosk too.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCb1lXdFBREAE

reviews.comment:
La atención es muy buena, pero no sé puede ser tan anacrónico con la tecnología. Nunca funciona el pago por la app y ahora no reciben tarjeta. Eso no es bueno

(Translated by Google)
The service is very good, but I don't know why they're so outdated with technology. The app payment never works, and now they don't accept cards. That's not good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3LUpiU0xREAE

reviews.comment:
El personal de la estacion de servicio es muy amable, a veces hay demora porque se amontonan los vehiculos y no dan abasto. Hace un tiempo laego que no tienen para sumar puntos serviclub

(Translated by Google)
The staff at the gas station are very friendly, but sometimes there are delays because vehicles get backed up and they can't keep up. They haven't had Serviclub points available for a while now.
